sentences.arabic: شَاهَدَ الطِّفْلُ بَرْنَامَجًا تَعْلِيمِيًّا عَلَى التَّابْلِيتِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je na tabletu gledalo edukativni program.
sentences.translationEn: The child watched an educational program on the tablet.

sentences.translation: Program je poučavao slova i brojeve.
sentences.translationEn: The program was teaching letters and numbers.

sentences.arabic: رَدَّدَ الطِّفْلُ الْحُرُوفَ مَعَ الْبَرْنَامَجِ بِصَوْتٍ عَالٍ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je glasno ponavljalo slova sa programom.
sentences.translationEn: The child repeated the letters with the program out loud.

sentences.translation: Majka se obradovala kad ga je čula da uči.
sentences.translationEn: The mother was happy when she heard him learning.
